# MSK Institute - Computer Education

## Organization Information
- **Name:** MSK Institute
- **Tagline:** Learn Today, Lead Tomorrow
- **Type:** Computer Education Institute
- **Location:** Shikohabad, Uttar Pradesh, India
- **Phone:** 8393042166
- **Email:** info@mskinstitute.in

## About MSK Institute
MSK Institute is a professional computer education center dedicated to providing high-quality training in programming, web development, data analytics, and other in-demand IT skills. We focus on practical, hands-on learning to help students and professionals advance their careers.

## Core Values
- **Quality Education:** Industry-standard curriculum designed by experienced professionals
- **Practical Learning:** Real-world projects and assignments
- **Student Success:** Placement assistance and career guidance
- **Innovation:** Regular updates to keep pace with technology trends

## Courses Offered

### 1. Python Programming
- **Duration:** 3 months
- **Fee:** ₹8,999
- **Description:** Master Python from basics to advanced concepts including OOP, data structures, and libraries
- **Target:** Beginners to intermediate learners

### 2. Java Development
- **Duration:** 4 months
- **Fee:** ₹10,999
- **Description:** Learn object-oriented programming with Java, including frameworks and real-world projects
- **Target:** Beginners to intermediate learners

### 3. CCC (Course on Computer Concepts)
- **Duration:** 2 months
- **Fee:** ₹3,999
- **Description:** Government-recognized computer literacy course covering OS, office applications, and internet basics
- **Target:** All levels

### 4. ADCA (Advanced Diploma in Computer Applications)
- **Duration:** 6 months
- **Fee:** ₹15,999
- **Description:** Comprehensive computer applications training including office tools, database, and web basics
- **Target:** All levels

### 5. Data Analytics
- **Duration:** 5 months
- **Fee:** ₹12,999
- **Description:** Learn data analysis with Python, SQL, and visualization tools
- **Target:** Intermediate learners

### 6. Web Development
- **Duration:** 6 months
- **Fee:** ₹14,999
- **Description:** Full-stack web development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks
- **Target:** Beginners to intermediate learners

## Facilities & Services
- Modern computer labs with latest software
- Wi-Fi enabled classroom
- Flexible batch timings (Morning, Afternoon, Evening)
- Online training options available
- Expert instructors with industry experience
- Placement assistance
- Interview preparation
- Resume building support
- Certificate upon completion

## Training Modes
- **In-Person:** Classroom training at our center in Shikohabad
- **Online:** Live virtual classes for remote learners
- **Hybrid:** Flexible combination of online and offline sessions

## Admissions
- **Admission Type:** Open enrollment (no entrance exam)
- **Prerequisites:** Basic computer literacy (for most courses)
- **How to Apply:** Call 8393042166 or visit our center for registration
- **Batches:** New batches starting every month

## Why Choose MSK Institute?
1. **Experienced Faculty:** Instructors with 5+ years of industry experience
2. **Practical Approach:** 70% practical, 30% theoretical learning
3. **Job-Oriented:** Curriculum aligned with industry requirements
4. **Affordable Fees:** Competitive pricing with flexible payment plans
5. **Success Rate:** 85% student placement rate
6. **Community:** Join a network of successful alumni

## Contact & Location

**Phone:** 8393042166
**Email:** info@mskinstitute.in

- Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Awards & Recognition
- ISO 9001:2015 Certified Training Institute
- Registered with NASSCOM
- Government-recognized CCC training center
- Partner with various job placement portals

## FAQ
**Q: What are the prerequisites?**
A: Most courses are for beginners. Advanced courses may require basic computer knowledge.

**Q: Do you provide certificates?**
A: Yes, industry-recognized certificates upon successful course completion.

**Q: Is placement assistance available?**
A: Yes, we provide job placement support for eligible candidates.

**Q: Can I get a refund?**
A: 7-day refund policy if not satisfied with the course.

**Q: Are online classes available?**
A: Yes, both online and offline training options are available.
